note: Q 'Обгоном вважається:'. Exam mirror testpdr.online (manualov.net 301-redirects here) marks option 3 — verbatim ПДР term 1.10 definition of обгін — and option order/wording matches ours exactly. Our current=2 (рух по правому узбіччі) is wrong; proposed official=3 confirmed. A one-off WebFetch of pdr.infotech.gov.ua claimed option 4 but a careful re-fetch found no such marking (hallucination); option 4 ('answers 1,2') is impossible since 1 and 2 are non-definitions.
